description_long: This sculpture depicts a nude female figure standing upright on a rectangular base. The figure is rendered in a classical style, with her arms crossed over her chest and her head slightly bowed, suggesting a contemplative or modest pose. The surface of the sculpture is smooth and appears to be made of white marble, with subtle detailing in the hair and body contours. The back of the figure shows naturalistic anatomical features, and the base is slightly textured, contrasting with the polished figure. The overall form is solid and monolithic, with no visible separations or moving parts. The sculpture exudes a sense of quiet introspection and classical beauty.
description: A smooth white marble sculpture of a nude female figure standing on a rectangular base, arms crossed over her chest in a modest pose.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the figure's bowed head, crossed arms, and detailed torso.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the back anatomy and the textured base behind the legs.
description_view_2: Left side view emphasizing the figure's profile, arm position, and the curve of the body.
description_view_3: Front-right view focusing on the facial features, chest, and the stance of the legs.
attribute_location_context: No specific setting or environment is visible; the sculpture appears isolated against a plain background.
